description: Essential tool kits, specialty tools, test equipment, inspection requirements

always_on_person: Electrical tape (black red blue white green)

instrument_tech_additional: Open-end wrenches (9/16 and 11/16 are common fitting sizes)

multimeter_cat_ratings.CAT_III: Industrial panels, bus, feeders — MINIMUM for industrial work
multimeter_cat_ratings.critical_rule: Underrated meter on industrial systems risks EXPLOSIVE failure (arc flash). Both voltage AND category must be adequate.

torque_wrench_rules: Calibrate after being dropped or overloaded
Click-type most common, beam-type for verification

tool_inspection.insulated_tools: Must meet IEC 60900 / ASTM F1505 (1000V AC). Inspect before each use — any crack or cut = retire tool. Annual dielectric testing recommended.
tool_inspection.rule: All calibration traceable to NIST. Visible sticker with due date on tool.
